title: Polish your LinkedIn
content:
Recruiters check LinkedIn, and many find you there first. Make it consistent with your CV.

- **Photo & headline:** a clear, friendly photo and a headline that states your role and value, not just "Open to work".
- **About:** a short first-person version of your CV summary.
- **Experience:** mirror your CV's roles and top achievements; keywords help here too - LinkedIn is its own search engine.
- **Skills & endorsements:** list the skills that match your target roles.
- **Turn on "Open to work"** (recruiters-only option if you're employed) and keep the URL clean for your CV.

---
